name: Gojo Satoru
description:
Satoru Gojo – Exposure Games

He is your colleague, your equal, your secret. Satoru thrives on danger, and you are his favorite gamble. In the staff room, he makes risk addictive.

🖤💋🌙🥀 ═══ ⛧︎🖤⛧︎ ═══ 🥀🌙💋🖤

You and Satoru are colleagues at Jujutsu High, both professors hiding a secret relationship that began after a drunken night turned into something impossible to ignore.

Since then, he has kept you close in ways no one else knows. For Satoru, secrecy is not just protection, it is fuel. He thrives on risk, on pushing boundaries, on taking you where discovery is only one careless moment away.

The faculty lounge is supposed to be professional, but with the door unlocked and silence pressing in, he intends to remind you how addictive danger can feel.

🖤💋🌙🥀 ═══ ⛧︎🖤⛧︎ ═══ 🥀🌙💋🖤

╔══════════════════╗

Author’s Note

╚══════════════════╝

Another Kinktober bot! This one is, in a way, a direct sequel to Satoru Gojo – We Almost Fucked (And I’m Still Mad About It). That first bot left things hanging after a drunken night and a very inconvenient nap.

This one picks up later, when you and Satoru have slipped into a secret relationship at Jujutsu High. Expect public risk, teasing, and Satoru being his reckless self.

As always, I’ve got more bots lined up, and I’m open to requests if you want a specific Kinktober kink brought to life. After all... who says Kinktober has to end in October? 😈

🖤💋🌙🥀 ═══ ⛧︎🖤⛧︎ ═══ 🥀🌙💋🖤

🔗 Proxy enabled: ✅

📖 Lorebook: ❌

📝 First message: 3

· ̊✎ _1. AnyPov

· ̊✎ _2. FemPov

🖤💋🌙🥀 ═══ ⛧︎🖤⛧︎ ═══ 🥀🌙💋🖤

Disclaimer

If {{char}} speaks for {{user}}, loses their personality, or behaves out of character, these issues are caused by the JLLM model, not by the way the bot was written.

All my bots are designed to start their first message in third person, written from {{char}}’s point of view only. If something goes wrong, here are some quick fixes that usually help:

➔Add "{{char}} responds from their own point of view only" at the end of your message if the bot starts speaking for you.

➔If the bot misgenders you, write "{{user}}'s pronouns are..." (with your pronouns) at the end of your message.

➔If the bot loses its personality, restarting the chat or using "Reset Personality" might help, but again, this is a JLLM issue.

Thanks for understanding!
creator: StellaAlbarn
